channel.title: Journal of Polymer Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Polymer Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2025-frontmatter3

item.title: The latest research status of porous sound-absorbing materials
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0211

item.title: Thermal annealing and microwave irradiation in enhancing the mechanical performance of 3D printing CF/PA12 composite
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0196

item.title: Investigation into the crystallization of poly-lactic acid following the application of a novel high molecular weight, high epoxy functionality polymer chain extender
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0224

item.title: Effect of AO 4426 on damping properties of PVA/CPE-AO 2246
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0219

item.title: Curcumin-encapsulated Pluronic micelles in chitosan/PEO nanofibers: a controlled release strategy for wound healing applications
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0182

item.title: Photocatalytic g-C3N4/poly(2-acrylamido-2-methylpropane sulfonic acid) composite hydrogel triggering the synergetic effect for long-lasting sustainable purifying organic wastewater
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0216

item.title: A dynamic pressure strategy to minimize void formation in vacuum infusion
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0089

item.title: Design and application of soft robot grippers using low-viscosity silicone by lost core injection molding manufacturing method
item.description: Article by Helmy Dewanto Bryantono, Meng-Hsun Tsai, Shi-Chang Tseng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0223
